---
title: "Software"
---

## R Packages

:::: {layout="[1,4]" layout-valign="center"}
::: text-center
[![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/felipelfv/structest/main/man/figures/logo.png){width="120px" fig-alt="structest logo"}](https://github.com/felipelfv/structest)

**structest**   [<i class="bi bi-github"></i>](https://github.com/felipelfv/structest)
:::

R package implementing statistical tests to reject the structural interpretation of a latent factor model.
::::
